S

SecretWord - Class in com.example.sol_eclipsado.model
Represents the secret word for the "Sol Eclipsado" game.
setLettersFound(int, char) - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord
Updates the array of found letters at a specific position.
setQuantityAid(int) - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.GameLogic
 
setQuantityFailure(int) - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.GameLogic
 
setSecretWord(String) - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord
Configures the secret word, initializes the discovery array, and stores the word in lowercase for case-insensitive comparisons.
setStage(Stage) - Static method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.StageMain
Sets the main stage of the program.
setWin(boolean) - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.GameLogic
 
sizeValidation() - Static method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord
Validates if the length of the secret word is within the allowed range (between 6 and 12 characters).
spacingWordValidation() - Static method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.model.SecretWord
Checks if the secret word contains any blank spaces (initial, middle, or final).
StageMain - Class in com.example.sol_eclipsado
Manages the primary stage (window) of the application.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.sol_eclipsado.Main
Starts the JavaFX application by setting the primary stage and loading the FXML layout for the welcome screen.
